api_key.description: Webflow API token (Site or OAuth access token). Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>); never logged.

site_id.description: The Webflow site ID to read collections, pages, and forms from. Required by every stream (legacy's siteResource helper fails without it).

base_url.description: Webflow API base URL override for tests or proxies.

accept_version.description: Optional Webflow Data API version to send as the Accept-Version header (e.g. 1.0.0 or 2.0.0). Omitted entirely when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
